narrative: Fed Chair Warsh and Rubio's Iran warnings drive a geopolitical risk premium — dollar firms as WTI crude surges +2.80%; gold lower -1.43%; equities -0.14%; DXY +0.03%; VIX 17.7. USD/JPY bids to 163.35 as energy shocks pressure the yen while the 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the move. GBP/USD bilateral divergence (spread 0.892%) remains the week's G10 theme as UK yields ramp up. Watch the ECB rate decision and press conference at 12:15 UTC today.
